scripts.check: pnpm syncpack:lint && turbo run lint format typecheck
scripts.fix: pnpm syncpack:fix && turbo run lint:fix format:fix
scripts.syncpack:fix: syncpack fix-mismatches && syncpack set-semver-ranges && pnpm syncpack:format
scripts.syncpack:format: syncpack format && pnpm exec biome format --write package.json apps/docs/package.json packages/ui/package.json
scripts.syncpack:lint: syncpack lint-semver-ranges && syncpack list-mismatches && ! rg -n --pcre2 '"@m3000/[^"]+": "(?!workspace:\*)' package.json apps/docs/package.json packages/ui/package.json
